summary: Integrated ADR 0286 onto the newer ADR 0269 mainline baseline using source commit e025bcd0c, preserved the already-verified private Apache Tika prerequisite and private Tesseract OCR runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, re-verified direct OCR plus the controller-local Tika-first fallback helper end to end, and cut release 0.177.107 with no additional platform-version bump beyond the current verified 0.130.71 baseline.

verification.check: Focused OCR regression coverage and syntax checks
verification.observed: The refreshed latest-main tree reran `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_tika_runtime_role.py tests/test_tesseract_ocr_runtime_role.py tests/test_document_extraction.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_service_id_resolver.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_post_verify_tasks.py tests/test_docker_publication_assurance_playbook.py` plus both service syntax checks; `71 passed in 3.02s` is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-targeted-checks-r1-0.177.107.txt`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=tika env=production` succeeded with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=129 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=24 rescued=1 ignored=0`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-tika-prereq-replay.txt`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=tesseract-ocr env=production` succeeded with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=127 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=21 rescued=0 ignored=0`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-live-apply-run.txt`.

Controller-local probes against `http://10.10.10.20:9998/version`, `http://10.10.10.20:3008/healthz`, and `http://10.10.10.20:3008/ocr` confirmed `Apache Tika 3.2.3`, a healthy OCR runtime payload, and direct OCR extraction `text: "OCR OK"`; the transcript is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-endpoint-verify-r1-0.177.107.txt`.

`python3 scripts/document_extraction.py collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/tesseract_ocr_runtime/files/ocr-ok.png --tika-url http://10.10.10.20:9998 --tesseract-url http://10.10.10.20:3008` returned `fallback_used: true`, `extraction_method: "tesseract"`, `tika_text: ""`, and `text: "OCR OK"`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-helper-verify-r1-0.177.107.txt`.

verification.check: Release automation status, dry run, and cut
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json`, the patch dry run, and the write run all completed on the rebased latest-main tree; the transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-release-status-r1-0.177.107.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-release-dry-run-r1-0.177.107.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-release-write-r1-0.177.107.txt`.

The final release tree reran ADR index generation plus the status-doc, dependency-diagram, diagram, and ops-portal generators, with transcripts preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-generate-adr-index-r1-0.177.107.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-generate-status-docs-r1-0.177.107.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-generate-dependency-diagram-r1-0.177.107.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-generate-diagrams-r1-0.177.107.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-generate-ops-portal-r1-0.177.107.txt`.

verification.check: Local generated-surface and receipt validation bundle
verification.observed: `make validate-generated-docs`, `make validate-generated-portals`, `git diff --check`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` completed on the final `0.177.107` tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-validate-generated-docs-r1-0.177.107.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-validate-generated-portals-r1-0.177.107.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-git-diff-check-r1-0.177.107.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-live-apply-receipts-validate-r1-0.177.107.txt`.
`make check-build-server` completed on the rebased latest-main tree and preserved its transcript in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-check-build-server-r1-0.177.107.txt`.

verification.check: Top-level repo automation and validation wrappers
verification.observed: `make validate` on `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-validate-r4-0.177.107.txt` completed every preceding lane and then failed only `workstream-surfaces` because branch `codex/ws-0286-live-apply-r3` maps to terminal workstream `ws-0286-live-apply`; `make remote-validate` on `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-remote-validate-r2-0.177.107.txt` passed every selected blocking check except that same expected branch guard; and `make pre-push-gate` on `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-pre-push-gate-r1-0.177.107.txt` passed 19 of 20 blocking checks with the same lone non-pass. Supporting lane proofs are also preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-type-check-r1-0.177.107.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-dependency-check-r1-0.177.107.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0286-workstream-surfaces-r1-0.177.107.txt`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0286 on top of repository release 0.177.107 and current live platform version 0.130.71.

No platform-version bump is recorded here because the integrated release captures a verified live capability on the already-current 0.130.71 baseline rather than introducing a new post-main platform mutation.

On the exact-main candidate branch, the only remaining non-pass in repo automation is the expected `workstream-surfaces` terminal-branch guard because `codex/ws-0286-live-apply-r3` still maps to `ws-0286-live-apply`; that branch-only condition should disappear once this exact commit lands on `origin/main`.
